div.class: o_kanban_record_top position-relative bg-100 border-4 border-primary border-start mx-4 my-3 p-2 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center

i.class: fa fa-mail-forward mr4 fw-normal text-500 flex-fill text-end

div.class: o_kanban_record_top position-relative bg-100 border-4 border-primary border-start mx-4 my-3 p-2 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center
o_kanban_record_top position-relative bg-100 border-4 border-primary border-start mx-4 my-3 p-2 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center

div.p: Various fields may use Python code or Python expressions. The following variables can be used:

ul.li: env: Odoo Environment on which the action is triggered
tasks: tasks on which the action is triggered
time, datetime, dateutil, timezone: useful Python libraries

div.class: o_kanban_record_top position-relative bg-100 border-4 border-primary border-start mx-4 my-3 p-2 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center
o_kanban_record_top position-relative bg-100 border-4 border-primary border-start mx-4 my-3 p-2 rounded-2 shadow-sm text-center
